‹ Tanay Nagar / Publications
ACEPS 2025 Oral Presentation·Published in PRS Global Open · Vol 13, S4 · pp 4–5

Exploring Bias in Letters of Recommendation using NLP Techniques

Tanay Nagar1, Sarah Jung2, Peter Wirth2, Alyssa Schappe2, Amorn N. Salyapongse3

1University of Wisconsin-Madison, United States·2Department of Surgery, UW SMPH·3Department of Orthopedics and Rehabilitation, University of Wisconsin School of Medicine and Public Health

Talk Slides PRS Global Article Google Scholar DOI BibTeX
TL;DRWe investigate implicit biases in 5,679 plastic surgery residency letters of recommendation through traditional NLP methods, examining how gender and race/ethnicity affect language use and other trends.

BibTeX
